  • API Reference
  • Cell

Cell#

FuelCell is the root of the component tree. It assembles a cathode and an anode FuelCellSide (each owning a catalyst layer, GDL, optional MPL, and flow channel) and a Membrane. The cell object holds only geometry and material parameters — no physics.

All physics are evaluated by a model object passed the cell at solve time:

model = ExplicitSteadyStateModel()
state = model.set_initial_conditions(cell, conditions)
state = model.solve(cell, conditions, state)

The CellState returned by solve mirrors the structure of FuelCell but holds runtime physical quantities (voltages, temperatures, transport resistances, water contents, saturation).

FuelCell#

class marapendi.cell.fuelcell.FuelCell(ca=<factory>, an=<factory>, membrane=<factory>, area=1.0, electrical_resistance=0.0, cell_number=1, mea_surface_heat_capacity=10000.0, use_eq_water_content_for_ionomer=True)[source]#

Bases: Cell

Proton exchange membrane fuel cell.

The cell object is a pure component tree: it holds geometry and material parameters only. All physics are evaluated by a separate model object:

model = ExplicitSteadyStateModel()
state = model.set_initial_conditions(cell, conditions)
state = model.solve(cell, conditions, state)
# state.cell_voltage, state.mea_temperature, … are now populated
Parameters:

  • ca (FuelCellSide)

  • an (FuelCellSide)

  • membrane (Membrane)

  • area (float)

  • electrical_resistance (float)

  • cell_number (int)

  • mea_surface_heat_capacity (float)

  • use_eq_water_content_for_ionomer (bool)

ca#

Cathode side (catalyst layer, GDL, optional MPL, flow channel).

Type:

FuelCellSide

an#

Anode side.

Type:

FuelCellSide

membrane#

Membrane component (e.g. PFSA).

Type:

Membrane

area#

Active cell area (m²).

Type:

float

electrical_resistance#

Through-plane electrical contact resistance (Ω·m²).

Type:

float

cell_number#

Number of cells in the stack (default 1 — single cell).

Type:

int

mea_surface_heat_capacity#

Effective MEA heat capacity per unit area (J/m²/K).

Type:

float

activation_overpotential(theta_PtO=0)[source]#
an: FuelCellSide#
ca: FuelCellSide#
calculate_cell_voltage()[source]#
calculate_theta_PtO()[source]#
cell_number: int = 1#
f_relax(t, x, u, p, n_memb_mesh=3)[source]#

Right-hand side for the ionomer relaxation sub-ODE only ([ds_relax_ca/dt, ds_relax_an/dt]).

f_transient(t, x, u, p, n_memb_mesh=3)[source]#

Right-hand side for the full transient ODE: [dT/dt | dλ/dt (membrane) | ds/dt (porous) | ds_relax/dt].

The state vector x is ordered as [mea_temperature, *membrane_water_profile, *saturation_profile, s_relax_ca, s_relax_an].

high_frequency_resistance()[source]#
mea_surface_heat_capacity: float = 10000.0#
membrane: Membrane#
ohmic_overpotential()[source]#
reversible_cell_voltage()[source]#
reversible_voltage_vs_RHE()[source]#
set_conditions_from_input_dict(u)[source]#

Build a CellState from the flat input dict u (keys are e.g. 'current-density').

set_conditions_from_input_functions(u, t)[source]#

Evaluate time-dependent input functions u at time t and update the cell state.

set_water_saturation_in_porous_layers(saturation_profile)[source]#
use_eq_water_content_for_ionomer: bool = True#
class marapendi.cell.fuelcell.FuelCellSide(cl=<factory>, gdl=<factory>, mpl=<factory>, ch=<factory>, has_mpl=False, has_gdl=True, thermal_contact_resistance=0.0, is_wet=False)[source]#

Bases: CellSide

One side (anode or cathode) of a PEM fuel cell.

Owns the porous layers (catalyst layer, optional microporous layer, gas diffusion layer) and flow channel for one electrode.

Parameters:

  • cl (CatalystLayer)

  • gdl (GasDiffusionLayer)

  • mpl (MicroPorousLayer)

  • ch (FlowChannel)

  • has_mpl (bool)

  • has_gdl (bool)

  • thermal_contact_resistance (float)

  • is_wet (bool)

cl#

Catalyst layer (defaults to PtCCatalystLayer).

Type:

CatalystLayer

gdl#

Gas diffusion layer.

Type:

PorousLayer

mpl#

Microporous layer.

Type:

PorousLayer, optional

ch#

Flow channel.

Type:

FlowChannel

has_mpl#

Whether this side includes a microporous layer.

Type:

bool

is_wet#

Whether this side is flooded with liquid (used for water electrolysis).

Type:

bool

thermal_contact_resistance#

Additional thermal contact resistance at the GDL/bipolar-plate interface (m²·K/W).

Type:

float

is_wet: bool = False#
set_catalyst_layer(cl)[source]#

Replace the catalyst layer.

set_channel(ch)[source]#

Replace the flow channel.

set_gas_diffusion_layer(gdl)[source]#

Replace the gas diffusion layer.

State#

class marapendi.cell.state.CellState(ca=<factory>, an=<factory>, membrane=<factory>, current_density=None, temperature=None, cell_voltage=None, E_rev=None, eta_act=None, eta_ohm=None, thermal_resistance=None, mea_temperature=None, mea_temperature_increase=None, mea_water_molar_volume=None, crossover_current=None, hfr=None)[source]#

Bases: object

Full state of the cell at one operating point.

Parameters:

  • ca (CellSideState)

  • an (CellSideState)

  • membrane (MembraneState)

  • current_density (float)

  • temperature (float)

  • cell_voltage (float)

  • E_rev (float)

  • eta_act (float)

  • eta_ohm (float)

  • thermal_resistance (float)

  • mea_temperature (float)

  • mea_temperature_increase (float)

  • mea_water_molar_volume (float)

  • crossover_current (float)

  • hfr (float)

E_rev: float = None#
an: CellSideState#
ca: CellSideState#
cell_voltage: float = None#
crossover_current: float = None#
current_density: float = None#
eta_act: float = None#
eta_ohm: float = None#
hfr: float = None#
property layers: list[LayerState]#

All layer states across both sides plus the membrane.

mea_temperature: float = None#
mea_temperature_increase: float = None#
mea_water_molar_volume: float = None#
membrane: MembraneState#
property side_layers: list[LayerState]#

All layer states across both sides, GDL-to-CL order.

property sides: tuple[CellSideState, CellSideState]#

(ca, an) side states, for for side in state.sides: ... loops.

temperature: float = None#
thermal_resistance: float = None#
class marapendi.cell.state.CellSideState(cl=<factory>, gdl=<factory>, mpl=None, ch=<factory>, h2ov_transport_resistance=None, reactant_transport_resistance=None, reactant_consumption=None, h2o_production=0.0, s_relax=None, membrane_water_flux=None, water_flux=None, liquid_flux=None, vapor_flux=None, gas_flux=0.0, rh_at_cl_without_crossover=None, estimated_water_content=None, estimated_water_content_derivative=None, liquid_eq_water_content=None, vapor_eq_water_content=None, is_liquid_equilibrated=False, alpha=None, peclet_over_modified_biot=None, biot_number=None)[source]#

Bases: object

State of one side (anode or cathode) of the cell.

Parameters:

  • cl (CatalystLayerState)

  • gdl (LayerState | None)

  • mpl (LayerState | None)

  • ch (FlowChannelState)

  • h2ov_transport_resistance (float)

  • reactant_transport_resistance (float)

  • reactant_consumption (float)

  • h2o_production (float)

  • s_relax (float | None)

  • membrane_water_flux (float)

  • water_flux (float)

  • liquid_flux (float)

  • vapor_flux (float)

  • gas_flux (float)

  • rh_at_cl_without_crossover (float)

  • estimated_water_content (float)

  • estimated_water_content_derivative (float)

  • liquid_eq_water_content (float)

  • vapor_eq_water_content (float)

  • is_liquid_equilibrated (bool)

  • alpha (float)

  • peclet_over_modified_biot (float)

  • biot_number (float)

alpha: float = None#
biot_number: float = None#
ch: FlowChannelState#
cl: CatalystLayerState#
estimated_water_content: float = None#
estimated_water_content_derivative: float = None#
gas_flux: float = 0.0#
gdl: LayerState | None#
h2o_production: float = 0.0#
h2ov_transport_resistance: float = None#
is_liquid_equilibrated: bool = False#
property layers: list[LayerState]#

All layer states, channel to CL order, including MPL if present.

liquid_flux: float = None#
membrane_water_flux: float = None#
mpl: LayerState | None = None#

property porous_layers: list[LayerState]#

All layer states on this side, GDL-to-CL order, including MPL if present.

reactant_consumption: float = None#
reactant_transport_resistance: float = None#

vapor_flux: float = None#
water_flux: float = None#
class marapendi.cell.state.CatalystLayerState(gas=<factory>, temperature=None, pressure=None, saturation_pressure=None, surface_tension=None, kinematic_viscosity=None, density=None, relative_humidity=None, liquid_saturation=0.0, non_wetting_saturation=0.0, capillary_pressure=None, RT=None, breakthrough_pressure=None, saturation_flow_resistance=None, non_wetting_flux=None, downstream_saturation=None, upstream_saturation=None, downstream_capillary_pressure=None, electrolyte_saturation=None, ionomer_water_content=None, overpotential=None, water_film_thickness=None, proton_resistance=None, theta_catalyst=None, eq_water_content=None, membrane_interface_water_content=None)[source]#

Bases: LayerState

State of a catalyst layer, in addition to the generic layer state.

Parameters:

  • gas (GasState)

  • temperature (float)

  • pressure (float)

  • saturation_pressure (float)

  • surface_tension (float)

  • kinematic_viscosity (float)

  • liquid_saturation (float)

  • non_wetting_saturation (float)

  • RT (float)

  • non_wetting_flux (float)

  • downstream_saturation (float)

  • upstream_saturation (float)

  • downstream_capillary_pressure (float)

  • electrolyte_saturation (float)

  • overpotential (float)

  • water_film_thickness (float)

  • proton_resistance (float)

  • theta_catalyst (float)

  • eq_water_content (float)

  • membrane_interface_water_content (float)

class marapendi.cell.state.MembraneState(temperature=None, saturation_pressure=None, density=None, water_content=None, water_flux=None, h2_permeation_flux=None, proton_resistance=None, eod_speed=None, absorption_coefficient=None, water_diffusivity=None, water_diffusion_resistance=None, vapor_equilibrium_saturation_water_content=None, peclet_number=None, ePe=None, ePexi=None, xi=None, water_content_profile=None, water_content_derivative_profile=None, diffusion_flux=None, eod_flux=None, water_net_flux=None)[source]#

class marapendi.cell.state.LayerState(gas=<factory>, temperature=None, pressure=None, saturation_pressure=None, surface_tension=None, kinematic_viscosity=None, density=None, relative_humidity=None, liquid_saturation=0.0, non_wetting_saturation=0.0, capillary_pressure=None, RT=None, breakthrough_pressure=None, saturation_flow_resistance=None, non_wetting_flux=None, downstream_saturation=None, upstream_saturation=None, downstream_capillary_pressure=None, electrolyte_saturation=None)[source]#

class marapendi.cell.state.FlowChannelState(gas=<factory>, temperature=None, pressure=None, saturation_pressure=None, inlet_gas_flow_rate=1e-12, inlet_liquid_flow_rate=None, inlet_liquid_saturation=None, inlet_stoichiometry=None)[source]#

Bases: object

State of a flow channel (anode or cathode).
